purpose: Route root-repository work to the smallest correct governance surface while keeping active repo state separate from template scaffolds.
decision_order: Governance-boundary or AGENTS changes route to .agents/skills/using-agents-md/SKILL.md first.
Repo docs work routes to docs/AGENTS.md before any live or reference child guide.
Repo-local skills or router metadata route to .agents/AGENTS.md before deeper files.
Template-package work routes to templates/base/AGENTS.md and then its indexed local guide.
If no repo-local surface fits, fall back to the narrowest user or global skill.

children.name: agents-governance-skill
children.summary: Decides whether governance changes belong in AGENTS.md, docs/reference, docs/live, or a skill package.
route_when: The task changes AGENTS hierarchy, local-guide boundaries, routing metadata, or doc-governance ownership.
The main uncertainty is which guidance surface owns the change.
avoid_when: The task only changes active progress or verification state.
The task is ordinary implementation work with no governance-surface decision.

children.name: repo-docs-root
children.summary: Owns root documentation workflow and splits active live docs from durable reference docs.
route_when: The task touches docs/live or docs/reference in the root repository.
The agent needs to decide whether a documentation change is live-state or durable truth.
avoid_when: The task only touches template docs under templates/base/.
The task is a repo-local skill change with no docs impact.

children.name: repo-live-docs
children.summary: Owns active repo runtime state and recovery surfaces.
route_when: The task changes current focus, progress, todo ordering, or session recovery notes.
The agent needs the active objective or latest verification before continuing repo work.
avoid_when: The change is durable policy or reference truth.
The task is inside template live-doc scaffolds.

children.name: repo-reference-docs
children.summary: Owns durable repo truth such as boundaries, codemap, policy, and lessons.
route_when: The task changes durable policy, architecture, entrypoints, or reusable lessons.
The task changes repo-local skill paths or router metadata and needs durable writeback review.
avoid_when: The change only updates active progress, blockers, or next action.
The task only changes template reference docs.

children.name: repo-agents-root
children.summary: Owns repo-local skills and machine-readable root routing metadata.
route_when: The task touches .agents/skills or root router metadata.
The task needs the repo-local skill inventory before choosing a governance surface.
avoid_when: The task only changes docs or template files.
The task is user/global skill selection outside the repository.

children.name: repo-skills-inventory
children.summary: Owns the repo-local skill package inventory and entrypoint updates.
route_when: A repo-local skill package is added, removed, renamed, or repurposed.
The task needs the immediate child inventory of .agents/skills.
avoid_when: The task is about template skill families rather than repo-local skills.
The task only updates live or reference docs with no repo-local skill impact.

children.name: template-root
children.summary: Constitutional root for the template package hierarchy; use only when work is inside templates/base.
route_when: The task edits files under templates/base/.
The agent needs the template subtree discovery index or inert live-doc rules.
avoid_when: The task only changes active root repo state or root repo guidance.
The task is a repo-local skill update outside templates/base.
